use_cases: Company about pages showcasing mission, values, and team information
Landing pages featuring company achievements and social proof
Trust-building sections with client/partner logo displays
Key metrics and statistics presentation for businesses
CTA-driven breakout sections for conversion-focused pages
ai_summary: A comprehensive about section component featuring dual image layouts, company logo grids, achievement statistics, and an optional breakout CTA card. Built with shadcn/ui primitives, this composite component serves as a complete company introduction page section with social proof elements and customizable content props for branding flexibility.
